import React from "react"; // ✅ Update these paths to match your assets folder structure import whyBg from "../../../assets/why_section_bg.png"; // or "../../assets/why_section_bg.png" depending on your setup import iconClapper from "../../../assets/clapper_icon.png"; import iconBolt from "../../../assets/icon_bolt.png"; import iconGlobe from "../../../assets/icon_globe.png"; export default function WhySection({ onOpenDemo }) { return (
{/* Background */}
{/* Content */}

Why CineGate

Public film licensing redesigned for African cinema.

{/* Card 1 */}

Public screenings
are complicated

  • › Licensing is unclear
  • › Negotiations are slow
  • › Many venues screen films informally
{/* Card 2 (highlight) */}

Pay once.
Screen once.

  • › Download licensed film
  • › Screen it one time
  • › Access automatically expires
{/* Card 3 */}

More African films
on more screens

  • › Legal access for venues
  • › Revenue for filmmakers
  • › Cultural visibility globally
Experience the one-time screening model
); } const S = { section: { position: "relative", width: "100%", padding: "64px 0 72px", overflow: "hidden", color: "#fff", }, // background image bg: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundSize: "cover", backgroundPosition: "center", filter: "brightness(1.06) contrast(1.03)", transform: "scale(1.02)", }, inner: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, maxWidth: 1180, margin: "0 auto", padding: "0 22px", textAlign: "center", }, title: { margin: 0, fontSize: 60, lineHeight: 1.05, fontWeight: 800, letterSpacing: 0.2, textShadow: "0 12px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, subtitle: { margin: "14px auto 0", maxWidth: 760, fontSize: 20, lineHeight: 1.4, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.72)", textShadow: "0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, grid: { marginTop: 36, display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr))", gap: 22, alignItems: "stretch", }, // ✅ shorter card height card: { position: "relative", borderRadius: 18, padding: "22px 22px 18px", background: "rgba(10,10,10,0.32)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,140,30,0.20)", boxShadow: "0 28px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", backdropFilter: "blur(8px)", overflow: "hidden", minHeight: 320, }, // ✅ middle card emphasis (subtle) cardHighlight: { background: "rgba(125,70,0,0.24)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,160,55,0.28)", }, // ✅ glow strongest at mid-sides cardSideGlowLeft: { position: "absolute", left: -22, top: "22%", width: 40, height: "56%", background: "radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,150,40,0.42), rgba(255,150,40,0) 70%)", filter: "blur(6px)", pointerEvents: "none", }, cardSideGlowRight: { position: "absolute", right: -22, top: "22%", width: 40, height: "56%", background: "radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,150,40,0.42), rgba(255,150,40,0) 70%)", filter: "blur(6px)", pointerEvents: "none", }, // ✅ bigger icons cardIcon: { width: 64, height: 64, objectFit: "contain", margin: "0 auto 10px", filter: "drop-shadow(0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.55))", }, cardHeading: { margin: "4px 0 0", fontSize: 34, lineHeight: 1.12, fontWeight: 800, textShadow: "0 12px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, orange: { color: "#F3A12B" }, rule: { height: 1, margin: "16px 0 14px", background: "linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255,160,55,0), rgba(255,160,55,0.25), rgba(255,160,55,0))", }, // ✅ tighter list spacing list: { listStyle: "none", padding: 0, margin: 0, textAlign: "left", display: "grid", gap: 10, }, li: { display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: 10, fontSize: 18, lineHeight: 1.35, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.78)", }, chev: { color: "#F3A12B", fontWeight: 900, transform: "translateY(1px)", minWidth: 12, }, ctaWrap: { marginTop: 40, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: 14, }, ctaText: { fontSize: 20, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", textShadow: "0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, // ✅ button matches mockup: compact width + correct height + gradient ctaBtn: { display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 14, padding: "14px 26px", borderRadius: 12, border: "1px solid rgba(255,160,55,0.38)", background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #FFB02E 0%, #E17316 55%, #B94E12 100%)", boxShadow: "0 18px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), inset 0 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.22)", cursor: "pointer", color: "#fff", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 24, lineHeight: 1, textShadow: "0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", }, // play icon pill (left) playPill: { width: 36, height: 36, borderRadius: 999, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", display: "grid", placeItems: "center", boxShadow: "inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", }, playTriangle: { width: 0, height: 0, borderTop: "8px solid transparent", borderBottom: "8px solid transparent", borderLeft: "12px solid #fff", transform: "translateX(1px)", filter: "drop-shadow(0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.45))", }, ctaLabel: { whiteSpace: "nowrap" }, };
